empty.title: No preferences yet
empty.subtitle: Add filters to help the group decide on this topic.
info.title: About Preferences
info.content: Preferences help the group decide on trip details before booking. The organizer creates topics (e.g. 'Location', 'Trip Type'), then each member distributes 100 credits across their preferred options. The group summary shows what matters most to everyone.
my.title: My Preferences
my.emptyHint: Add what matters to you. You have 100 credits to distribute.
my.exceedsMax: Total credits exceed 100. Remove credits to save.
my.zeroCredit: Every filter needs at least 1 credit.
resetAll.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete all members' preferences for this topic. This cannot be undone.
group.title: Group Summary
group.empty: No group preferences yet. Waiting for members to add their filters.
topic.field.title: Topic Name
topic.seededLabelsHint: Add options members can quickly pick from.
topic.placeholder.title: e.g. Trip Type, Location, Accommodation Filters
topic.delete.title: Delete Topic
topic.delete.confirm: Delete this topic? All member preferences for this topic will be permanently removed.
emptyTopics.title: No topics yet
emptyTopics.subtitle: No topics yet. Create one to start collecting group preferences.
emptyTopics.organizerSubtitle: Create topics to collect preferences from your group.
emptyTopics.info.title: About Prework Topics
emptyTopics.info.content: Prework helps your group align on trip preferences before committing to any plans. The organizer creates topics (e.g. 'Location', 'Accommodation Type', 'Trip Style'), then every member distributes 100 credits across their preferred options. The group summary reveals what matters most to everyone — making decisions easier for the whole group.
